name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, cash flow gaps cause late orders. We provide predictive cash flow forecasting instead of manual cash flow tracking spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Cash flow gaps due to delayed payments and unpredictable sales.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Cash flow gaps due to delayed payments and unpredictable sales.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, cash flow gaps cause late orders. We provide predictive cash flow forecasting instead of manual cash flow tracking spreadsheets.
